content:
# Carbon Nanodots

**Summary**: Small carbon-based nanoparticles with high surface area and chemical stability.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] utilized carbon nanodots (CNDs) as a drag-reducing agent for the emulsified acid system.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Used as a novel, environmentally friendly alternative to traditional drag reducers.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Characterization of size and stability.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- CNDs were found to be effective viscosity reducers at both 15% and 20% HCl concentrations. ([[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023, p. 71]])
- [[2023-al-dogail|AL-DOGAIL, 2023]] Size typically under 10 nm.
